methodology: Schema + baseline only. No live browser sessions, no staging/production URLs, no tri-matrix (anonymous/free/paid) per tier executed in the authoring environment. Populate failures[] when QA or Playwright runs complete.

journeyTemplate.label: CAT / practice exams (if applicable to tier)

tiers.label: RN (NCLEX-RN)
tiers.notes: Primary pathway; validate locale prefixes (e.g. /us/rn/...) per routing docs.

tiers.label: PN / LPN / RPN (as product maps)
tiers.notes: Confirm terminology in UI matches country (RPN vs LPN); no cross-tier copy from RN without review.

tiers.label: NP
tiers.notes: Verify exam product and entitlement SKUs match pathway; CAT applicability per product rules.

tiers.label: Allied health
tiers.notes: See allied hubs under marketing routes; question bank scope differs from RN.

tiers.label: Pre-nursing
tiers.notes: Foundational content; paywall tier may differ; validate no premium leakage on previews.

tiers.label: New graduate / refresher
tiers.notes: Often blog + lesson cross-links; validate internal links per audit-internal-links tooling.

paywallMatrix.description: For each tier, run anonymous vs free vs paid where product supports it.

recommendedExecution: Parameterize Playwright with BASE_URL, LOCALE, PATHWAY_SLUG, and test account fixtures (Stripe test mode).
Log each failure: tierId, step id, url, role, httpStatus, screenshot object key (admin-only bucket).
Batch runs by tier to avoid overloading CI; cap parallel workers.
